title: Denoising image-based spatial transcriptomics data with DenoIST.
author: Kwok AWC Vannan A Banovich NE Kropski JA Shim H McCarthy DJ
content: S-EPMC12642576 PMC12642576 Denoising image-based spatial transcriptomics data with DenoIST. Image-based spatial transcriptomics (IST) technologies provide unprecedented resolution of gene expression in tissue sections, but suffer from contamination of cells' gene expression profiles due
